name: Cloud × AI Infrastructure (ΔTOM TARGET v1)
description: Akamai + Linode edge / GPU inference / multicloud play. Pure-deterministic 4L+4S+4G+3E+3M+2T scorer per the ΔTOM TARGET architecture spec. Inputs: latency/security/gpu/egress/multicloud/trigger scores 1-5 OR segment fallback.

ai_saas.note: Core inference product, heavy GPU + RAG/LLM dependency

evidence_schema.security_score: 1-5: 5=regulated+public API+bot/fraud risk, 4=two of three, 3=one of three, 2=mild, 1=none
evidence_schema.gpu_inference_score: 1-5: 5=core inference product, 4=heavy RAG/LLM, 3=regular AI features, 2=light AI, 1=none
evidence_schema.multicloud_score: 1-5: 5=explicit multicloud/sovereignty mandate, 4=K8s+Terraform+portability, 3=multi-region one cloud, 2=single cloud planning multi, 1=single cloud

T1.action: executive_play — direct CISO/CTO outreach + Akamai+Linode joint pitch

T3.action: nurture — content drip, watch for trigger events
